text: This chapter shall be liberally construed to the end that the greatest force and effect may be given to its provisions for the promotion of public safety.
markdown:
### Chapter 322. Driver Licenses
##### § 322.42 — Construction of chapter

This chapter shall be liberally construed to the end that the greatest force and effect may be given to its provisions for the promotion of public safety.

subsections.text: This chapter shall be liberally construed to the end that the greatest force and effect may be given to its provisions for the promotion of public safety.
